authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(65) — Isabella Lake
sources.quotedText: (65) Isabella Lake (Lake Isabella, Kern Co.). All year. 5 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a) — General Provisions for waters listed in the special-regulations table
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon (CDFW)
sources.quotedText: R4 Kern Lake Isabella Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take January-April & November-December

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: Wikipedia — Lake Isabella, Kern County, California (infobox coordinates; used because the USGS GNIS ArcGIS gazetteer (nationalmap.gov geonames MapServer/7) has no queryable record for this reservoir under either "Lake Isabella" or "Isabella Lake" in Kern County, CA — though its GNIS Feature ID 271737 is cited via {{GNIS|271737|Isabella Lake}} in the article, and the named cove/bay sub-features indexed under that same gazetteer service — Rocky Point Bay, Robinson Bay, Kissack Bay, Paradise Cove, Stine Cove, Joughin Cove, all Kern Co., CA — cluster tightly around this exact point, corroborating the location; the file's prior coordinate (-118.4600, 35.6580) was off by roughly 3.3 km, well outside that cluster)
sources.quotedText: {{Coord|35|40|17.69|N|118|25|38.05|W|type:waterbody_region:US-CA|display=inline,title}} = 35.671581, -118.427236, corrected from the file's prior recorded coordinate (-118.4600, 35.6580).

parameters.counting_rule: The table entry sets a 5-trout daily bag limit; per 14 CCR 7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit also equals 5.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Lake Isabella (Kern Co., Region 4) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a release month range of January-April & November-December.
